languages.text: "Когда священные вероятности складывается столь уникальным образом, отказ от принятия их указаний влечет за собой неудачи. Мы на Темплума-Каликсис-Экс-17 будем молиться о вашем благоразумии".
"When sacred probabilities add up in such a unique way, refusing to accept their guidance results in failure. We on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 will pray for your good judgement."
languages.original_text: "Когда священные вероятности складывается столь уникальным образом, отказ от принятия их указаний влечет за собой неудачи. Мы на Темплума-Каликсис-Экс-17 будем молиться о вашем благоразумии".

traits.locale_text: "When sacred probabilities add up in such a unique way, refusing to accept their guidance results in failure. We on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 will pray for your good judgement."
"When sacred probabilities add up in such a unique way, refusing to accept their guidance results in failure. We on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 will pray for your good judgement."
"When sacred probabilities add up in such a unique way, refusing to accept their guidance results in failure. We on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 will pray for your good judgement."

languages.text: 「聖なる確率がこのような独特な形で集まると、その導きを拒むことは失敗に繋がります。アルタール・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト17の我々は、あなたの賢明な判断を祈ります」
languages.original_text: "When sacred probabilities add up in such a unique way, refusing to accept their guidance results in failure. We on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 will pray for your good judgement."

traits.locale_text: 「聖なる確率がこのような独特な形で集まると、その導きを拒むことは失敗に繋がります。アルタール・テンプラム・カリシス・エクスト17の我々は、あなたの賢明な判断を祈ります。」

languages.text: «Cuando las sagradas probabilidades se suman de forma tan singular, negar su guía conlleva el fracaso. Desde Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, rezaremos por su buen juicio».
languages.original_text: "When sacred probabilities add up in such a unique way, refusing to accept their guidance results in failure. We on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 will pray for your good judgement."

traits.locale_text: «Cuando las sagradas probabilidades se suman de forma tan singular, negar su guía conlleva el fracaso. Desde Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, rezaremos por su buen juicio».

languages.text: "Wenn sich heilige Wahrscheinlichkeiten auf eine so einzigartige Weise summieren, führt die Ablehnung ihrer Beratung zum Scheitern. Wir werden auf Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 beten, dass Ihr die richtige Entscheidung trefft."
languages.original_text: "When sacred probabilities add up in such a unique way, refusing to accept their guidance results in failure. We on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 will pray for your good judgement."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn sich heilige Wahrscheinlichkeiten auf eine so einzigartige Weise summieren, führt die Ablehnung ihrer Beratung zum Scheitern. Wir werden auf Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 beten, dass Ihr die richtige Entscheidung trefft."

languages.text: « Lorsque les probabilités sacrées s'accumulent de manière aussi inédite, refuser d'écouter leurs conseils est synonyme d'échec. Avec mes frères de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, nous prierons pour que vous fassiez le bon choix. »
languages.original_text: "When sacred probabilities add up in such a unique way, refusing to accept their guidance results in failure. We on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 will pray for your good judgement."

traits.locale_text: « Lorsque les probabilités sacrées s'accumulent de manière aussi inédite, refuser d'écouter leurs conseils est synonyme d'échec. Avec mes frères de Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17, nous prierons pour que vous fassiez le bon choix. »

languages.text: “当神圣概率以如此独特的方式叠加时，拒绝接受其指引必将导致失败。我们卡利西斯祭坛17号将为您的明智判断祈祷。”
languages.original_text: "When sacred probabilities add up in such a unique way, refusing to accept their guidance results in failure. We on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 will pray for your good judgement."

traits.locale_text: “当神圣概率以如此独特的方式叠加时，拒绝接受其指引必将导致失败。我们卡利西斯祭坛17号将为您的明智判断祈祷。”

languages.text: "Kutsal olasılıklar böylesine eşsiz bir şekilde toplandığında, rehberliklerini kabul etmeyi reddetmek başarısızlıkla sonuçlanır. Biz Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17'dekiler, doğru kararı vermeniz için dua edeceğiz."
languages.original_text: "When sacred probabilities add up in such a unique way, refusing to accept their guidance results in failure. We on Altar-Templum-Calixis-Ext-17 will pray for your good judgement."
